title: SKILL drift contract test (CI gate)
description: CI guarantee that generated SKILL artifacts stay in sync with canonical source. Contract test runs pnpm build:skills then `git diff --exit-code packages/cli/templates/{claude,codex}-skills/` — non-zero exit means someone edited generated files without updating SOURCE.md (or vice versa).

files.change: NEW: vitest test that runs build script in tmpdir, diffs against committed templates/, asserts no diff

criteria: Contract test runs build:skills against tmpdir copy of templates
Test fails with clear message pointing to SOURCE.md when drift detected
Integrated into pnpm test (no separate script)
